query: TITLE-ABS-KEY(("weather forecast*" OR "meteorological forecast*" OR "heat forecast*" OR "temperature forecast*" OR "early warning system*" OR "heat warning*" OR "heat alert*" OR "weather advisor*" OR "climate information" OR "forecast-based intervention*" OR "weather-health intervention*" OR "heat wave warning*" OR "temperature alert*" OR "heathealth warning*" OR "thermal warning*" OR "hot weather warning*") AND ("temperature-mortality" OR "temperature-morbidity" OR "heat-health" OR "thermal stress" OR hyperthermia OR "heat-related illness" OR "heat stroke" OR "heat exhaustion" OR "heat-related death*" OR "excess mortality" OR "heat-attributable death*" OR "temperature-related mortality" OR "thermal mortality" OR "hot weather mortality" OR "heat burden" OR "heat impact*") AND (("randomized controlled trial*" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment*" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "difference-in-difference*" OR "instrumental variable*" OR "propensity score" OR matching OR "causal inference" OR "impact evaluation" OR "program* evaluation" OR "intervention stud*" OR "treatment effect*" OR "exogenous variation" OR "policy experiment*" OR "field experiment*" OR "controlled before-after" OR "interrupted time series") OR ("before and after" OR "pre-post" OR "policy evaluation" OR "effectiveness stud*" OR "outcome evaluation" OR "comparative stud*" OR "cohort stud*" OR "longitudinal stud*")))
